data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for SMS/app notifications indicating when a customer is three numbers away. However, the evidence provided does not include any API responses or state checks that confirm the implementation of this notification feature. The linked use case mentions the need for such notifications, but without concrete evidence of their functionality, this results in a gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of SMS/app notifications being sent when the number is approaching.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify SMS Notification Functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if SMS notifications are triggered when a customer is three numbers away.
